section.h2: Features using Phoenixml Xslt and XQuery packages

ul.li: XSLT 3.0 against XML input or no input starting with xsl:template name="xsl:initial-template", allowing the use of xsl:result-document and xsl:message, presented in the result editor pane
XQuery 3.1 against XML input or no input, fn:trace can now be examined by selecting '*** trace ***' from the "result documents" select box
optional automatic evaluation of XSLT/XQuery as Blazor code is run from a web worker
